name: No Bake Caramel Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, margarine, and evaporated milk in a saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Add pudding mix and oats, stirring until well combined.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
5. Allow cookies to cool for 15 minutes before removing from the paper.
